overview: AgentLayer is a production-grade ICP-native execution layer for AI agents, providing 42 deterministic, composable primitives as callable canister methods. Features a standardized execution contract, comprehensive admin validation dashboard with automated test suites for every capability, and usage-based monitoring.
features: Admin validation dashboard with automated test suite generation
Per-capability test execution engine with pass/fail tracking
Comprehensive test coverage: required fields, optional fields, combinations, edge cases, error handling
Internet Identity authentication with first-user-as-admin assignment
Live playground for testing any capability
API key management for agent/headless access
HTTP outcall caching for fetch_url capability
Full audit log for API key lifecycle events
